- Awakeners are people with silver cores who have been touched by a Higher Will, which causes insanity if not linked with a person of suitable spiritual ability. (actual description is more complicated but it works for now)
- Almost anyone who can link can only sustain one awakener link  at a time. The exception is keeper 617 (player) who doesnt seem to have a limit
- Mythag's Black Pool contains a giant silver core sustained by  Tawil and Alistair, which allows Mythag awakeners to be considered "linked" even if its not to a human.
